results.rendered_html:
juṣṭi (von 1. juṣ) f. Liebe, Liebeserweisung; Gunst; Befriedigung: yasya juṣṭiṃ sominaḥ kāmayante  AV. 4,24,5 . juṣṭā bhavantu juṣṭayaḥ  ṚV. 1,10,12 . juṣṭirasi juṣasva no juṣṭā no 'si juṣṭiṃ te gameyam  TS. 1,6,3,2 .  ŚĀṄKH. ŚR. 1,12,5 .  LĀṬY. 3,6,3 . tayorjuṣṭiṃ mātariśvā jagāma  ṚV. 10,114,1 . juṣṭī naro brahmaṇā vaḥ pitṝṇāmakṣamavyayam 7,33,4 .
— Vgl. a˚, havya˚.
